item.title: The 2026-2027 Season of Events - 05/01/2026 12:00am EDT to 09/08/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 30 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Here it is, folks! There are still a couple of [...]
item.dc:creator: The Ritz Theatre
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The 2026-2027 Season of Events on May 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include season of events and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: "Aspen Trees" Thursday, July 9, 2026 9am-12pm or 6pm-9pm #07092601 or #07092602 - 07/09/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/09/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Pre-registration and payment is required by Friday, July 3. Paint "Aspen Trees" in water mixable oils with Carol Hoffman on Thursday, July 9 from 9am until 12 pm or from 6pm-9pm. Please arrive at least 15 minutes before class time. Carol will guide you through the process of creating this painting whether you are a beginner or more advanced painter. All of the materials including the 11"x14" canvas are included in the price of the class. Minimum class size 3 people, maximum of 8. Please bring a large box to take your painting home in. Cost is $50 for TAG members & $60 for non-members. Call Carol with questions. 419 624 7020, Tiffin Art Guild at 419-443-0478 (tiffinartguild@att.net), or stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Aspen Trees" Thursday, July 9, 2026 9am-12pm or 6pm-9pm #07092601 or #07092602 on Jul 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include advanced painter and aspen trees.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/09/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/09/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Shop Tiffin Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and summer activities.

item.title: Taste of Lebanon - 07/09/2026 6:30pm EDT to 07/09/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Enjoy the Flavors of Lebanon
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Taste of Lebanon on Jul 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and flavors of lebanon.

item.title: Downtown Trivia Night at The Knights of Columbus - America 250!! - 07/09/2026 7:00pm EDT to 07/09/2026 8:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 49 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Bring your American History knowledge and dress is Red, White & Blue! We are celebrating America 250!! Groups of all ages are invited to compete in two rounds of general trivia questions plus the final questions of local interest. Answers will be judged by local celebrities. Participants are asked to form teams of 6 or fewer, which can be composed of all ages. Teams will write their answers to be judged by local celebrities. Questions will be geared toward ages 12 and up. No phones, tablets, or electronic devices may be accessed during the contest. A traveling trophy will be awarded to the winning team. **ONE GrowthZone ticket per team. List each of the team members on the ticket.
item.dc:creator: Downtown Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Downtown Trivia Night at The Knights of Columbus - America 250!! on Jul 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and trivia night.

item.title: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) - 07/09/2026 7:00pm EDT to 07/09/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA This is our concert series, free to the public. Come out and have your ears blessed, and put a smile on that face on Thursdays! Can't wait to see you!

item.yodel:media_alt_text: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) on Jul 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin park recreation and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: ServSafe Manager Class - 07/10/2026 10:00am EDT to 07/17/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The ServSafe Manager course will be offered on July 10th and 17th. This class will consist of an instructor-led class with a 9th edition ServSafe manager textbook and online exam voucher included.

item.yodel:media_alt_text: ServSafe Manager Class on Jul 10, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include 9th edition textbook and online exam voucher.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/10/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/10/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 47 Clay St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Simply Shop Local
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 10, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include local businesses and seasonal.

item.title: Simply Susan’s Strawberry Saturdays! - 07/11/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 70 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Chocolate covered strawberry cups are returning! $5 each until sold old! Come see us every Saturday during the farmers market! 70 s Washington. St Tiffin Ohio 44883
item.dc:creator: Simply Susan's
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Simply Susan’s Strawberry Saturdays! on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include affordable treats and chocolate covered strawberry cups.

item.title: BREAKFAST & PIEROGI @ JAM’s Markets Saturdays 9a-1p - 07/11/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 144 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us at JAM’s Markets every Saturday from 9 AM to 2 PM for a delightful breakfast experience! Stop by 145 Madison St, Tiffin, Ohio, and enjoy a variety of freshly made breakfast and lunch items, including delicious pierogi and artisanal sourdough breads. Our offerings are available while supplies last, so come early to savor these buzzworthy bites!
item.dc:creator: JAM's Monthly Markets
item.yodel:media_alt_text: BREAKFAST & PIEROGI @ JAM’s Markets Saturdays 9a-1p on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include artisan sourdough and breakfast.

item.title: Farmers Market - 07/11/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 195 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Discover the joy of fresh produce, delightful baked goods, and stunning flowers, all waiting for you every Saturday morning!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Seneca Farmers Market
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Farmers Market on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include fresh produce and sustainability.

item.title: Farmers Market - 07/11/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 195 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Discover the joy of fresh produce, delightful baked goods, and stunning flowers, all waiting for you every Saturday morning!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Seneca Farmers Market
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Farmers Market on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include sustainability and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: 2026 Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing - 07/11/2026 11:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 112 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tickets are on sale NOW for the Second Annual Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing The Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing is BACK — and bigger than ever!! Join us on Saturday, July 11, 2026 from 11 AM – 4 PM for a one-of-a-kind, Happy Gilmore-themed mini golf experience right through the heart of Downtown Tiffin, Ohio. Putt your way through 18 holes hosted by participating local businesses, explore everything downtown has to offer, and compete for trophies, gift baskets, gift cards, door prizes, and bragging rights — all in one unforgettable summer day. Tickets are $20 per golfer and going fast. Order online here: https://ssgink.com/shop/ols/products/2026-summer-downtown-mini-golf-outing-tickets Or purchase in person at SSG Ink or Simply Susan’s while supplies last. Online orders will be pulled the next business day, and you’ll be notified by text with pickup hours once your tickets are ready. Grab your friends, family, coworkers, or golf crew and come spend one happy day downtown. 18 holes. 18 businesses. 1 happy day.
item.dc:creator: Bailiwicks Coffee Company
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2026 Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and sports.

item.title: 2026 Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing - 07/11/2026 11:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 112 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tickets are on sale NOW for the Second Annual Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing The Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing is BACK — and bigger than ever!! Join us on Saturday, July 11, 2026 from 11 AM – 4 PM for a one-of-a-kind, Happy Gilmore-themed mini golf experience right through the heart of Downtown Tiffin, Ohio. Putt your way through 18 holes hosted by participating local businesses, explore everything downtown has to offer, and compete for trophies, gift baskets, gift cards, door prizes, and bragging rights — all in one unforgettable summer day. Tickets are $20 per golfer and going fast. Order online here: https://ssgink.com/shop/ols/products/2026-summer-downtown-mini-golf-outing-tickets Or purchase in person at SSG Ink or Simply Susan’s while supplies last. Online orders will be pulled the next business day, and you’ll be notified by text with pickup hours once your tickets are ready. Grab your friends, family, coworkers, or golf crew and come spend one happy day downtown. 18 holes. 18 businesses. 1 happy day.
item.dc:creator: Shop Tiffin Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2026 Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include 2026 downtown tiffin mini golf outing and downtown tiffin.

item.title: 2026 Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing - 07/11/2026 11:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 112 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tickets are on sale NOW for the Second Annual Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing The Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing is BACK — and bigger than ever!! Join us on Saturday, July 11, 2026 from 11 AM – 4 PM for a one-of-a-kind, Happy Gilmore-themed mini golf experience right through the heart of Downtown Tiffin, Ohio. Putt your way through 18 holes hosted by participating local businesses, explore everything downtown has to offer, and compete for trophies, gift baskets, gift cards, door prizes, and bragging rights — all in one unforgettable summer day. Tickets are $20 per golfer and going fast. Order online here: https://ssgink.com/shop/ols/products/2026-summer-downtown-mini-golf-outing-tickets Or purchase in person at SSG Ink or Simply Susan’s while supplies last. Online orders will be pulled the next business day, and you’ll be notified by text with pickup hours once your tickets are ready. Grab your friends, family, coworkers, or golf crew and come spend one happy day downtown. 18 holes. 18 businesses. 1 happy day.
item.dc:creator: The Poignon Project
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2026 Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include family and gift baskets.

item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2026 Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include family event and happy gilmore theme.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/11/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/11/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Shop Tiffin Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and summer activities.

item.description: Location : 1700 Duchess Ln, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA DJ Biscuit is back for another round of awesomeness for a Christmas in July themed party!8p-12a!

item.yodel:media_alt_text: Christmas in July on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include dj biscuit and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Daybreak Service - 07/12/2026 8:30am EDT to 07/12/2026 9:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 131 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for Daybreak Service at Trinity United Church of Christ — a peaceful 30-minute morning gathering to start your day with reflection and community. When: March 1, 2026, 8:30 AM. Where: 131 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH. All are welcome. #DaybreakService #TrinityUCC #TiffinOH #MorningWorship #Community
item.dc:creator: Trinity United Church of Christ Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Daybreak Service on Jul 12, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include daybreak service and morning worship.

item.title: Service of the Word - 07/12/2026 10:00am EDT to 07/12/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for worship, Sunday mornings at 10:00 am. In person or online via Facebook and Youtube. (search: Trinity UCC Tiffin)

item.yodel:media_alt_text: Service of the Word on Jul 12, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include worship and Religious.

item.title: Music Industry Summer Camp - 07/12/2026 3:00pm EDT to 07/16/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 231 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us at the 27th annual Tiffin University Music Industry Summer Camp and enjoy a total creative experience in writing, performing and recording rock, pop, jazz, r&b, a cappella, hip hop and other commercial styles! You’ll also work with industry professionals on how to succeed as an independent artist and music entrepreneur! With lots of individual attention and working in small ensembles and production teams, campers each take the lead in the creation of original pop, rock, r&b and hip hop music, a cappella arrangements, and solo and group performances. Campers perform in rock, pop, hip hop and indie bands and vocal groups, receive private instruction and solo coachings, participate in workshops on songwriting, beatboxing, live looping, studio recording and production, arranging, live sound engineering, and other topics key to success on stage and in the studio. You’ll collaboratively work with professional artists-in-residence to create and record original music together. You’ll engage in co-writing activities with fellow campers and pro songwriters, and then you’ll work with a professional producer in the recording and mixing of your songs. Camp ends on Thursday evening with a public in-person and live-streamed performance of what we’ve created together! The camp is open to all high school and college students, as well as amateur and professional musicians and educators!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin University
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Music Industry Summer Camp on Jul 12, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include college students and high school students.
